sizing_rule.note: Allocate 1R base unit (1% of capital) to all qualifying trades; scale up to 3R (3.0× multiplier) for highest R:R ratio trades (minimum 2.5:1 threshold). Uses R-multiple framework with concentration multiplier for conviction trades.

source_rule_text: Allocate larger position sizes to opportunities with the highest probability-weighted reward-to-risk ratio, concentrating capital in the highest-conviction trades within a diversified portfolio.
